Latitude and longitude coordinates are: 2.588941, 101.963676.
Rantau is a town with the population close to 8,000 people, located in the neighborhood of Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia.
Despite being quite small, the town is a center of financial, educational, medical and other services for small villages surrounding the town.
Local facilities and services are modern and advanced.
The latitude of Rantau, Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia is 2.588941, and the longitude is 101.963676.
Rantau, Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia is located at Malaysia country in the Towns place category with the gps coordinates of 2° 35' 20.1876'' N and 101° 57' 49.2336'' E.
Rantau, Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia elevation is 27 meters height, that is equal to 89 feet.
Coordinates of Rantau, Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia is given above in both decimal degrees and DMS (degrees, minutes and seconds) format.
The country code given is in the ISO2 format.

Untold Lives : a sequence of poems.
Untold Lives : a sequence of poems.
Untold Lives : a sequence of poems.
By: Brindabella Press: DOBSON, Rosemary.
With a wood engraving, 'Breakaway', by Mike Hudson.
#108 of 240 numbered copies, signed by the poet, and the printer, Alec Bolton.
Hand-set and -printed.
Tall 8vo.
36pp.
Hand-bound by Robin Tait in cloth-backed papered boards with mylar dustwrapper.
A fine clean copy.
Owner's bookplate.
*** The 25th publication of Alec Bolton's Brindabella Press / Officina Brindabella (the latter title used between 1985 and 1992).
Title: Untold Lives : a sequence of poems.
Author Name: Brindabella Press: DOBSON, Rosemary.

The No.
6 seed Shelton High boys volleyball team swept visiting the Fairfield Warde/Ludlowe Coop, 3-0 (25-19, 25-18, 25-23) in the first round of the Class L state tournament on Tuesday afternoon at Murray Gymnasium.
Seeded No.
11, Fairfield (8-11) rallied from a 20-12 deficit to get within a point at 23-22.
After the teams traded serves, Grant Fevrier finished off the sweep for Shelton with a searing kill through Fairfield's defense.
Shelton advances to face third-seeded Southington High on Friday, June 6, at 6 p.m.

Season Tickets at VIP (6 Tickets) for Feb 1 - Mar 30, 2019.
VIP (8 Tickets per show) is your section for the rest of the quarter of Feb 1 - Mar 30, 2019.
We know you love live music but can't make it to each and every show, so we have a HANDY FORM to help us confirm which shows you'd like to attend.
If there are any shows remaining that you decide you do not want to/can't attend, we'll then sell it back to the general public.

Description PLEASE HELP!!
My silver 2007 Superglide was stolen from my home on 6/16/08.
I beleive James Miller is the man who stole my bike.
It has Ohio License Plates which show county 50 (red sticker) and an expiration date of the plate is 11/08.
The man who I beleive stole my bike is 6ft 2, with gray hair and beard, he is 52years old.
The bike has a windshield, forward controls and vance and hines pipes.
It also has a rear passenger pillion on it.
You can also contact the Springfield Police dept @ 330-542-2895 and ask for office Gus Lolakis..
PLEASE HELP ME BRING MY BABY BACK, !
!

55-56 Oldsmobile Copper/Brass 100% New Made in USA radiator.
Replaces OEM # 3133684.
May also replace others such as 3130604, 3131179.
This is a correct appearing and fitting replacement radiator with regular serpentine fin design.
The core size is 20" tall x 23.5" wide.
Some of the attached pictures show the radiator prior to painting so that the details are more visible.
This radiator does not have a transmission cooler.
Top neck is 1.5" diameter & lower neck is 1 3/4" diameter.
We stock the radiator in both regular and high efficiency core designs.
The regular core has the tubes on 9/16" centers and the high efficiency has the tubes on 3/8" centers.
The high efficiency will cool about 18% to 20% better than the regular core because of the denser design and more surface area.
We strongly suggest using the high efficiency core design if you are in a warmer climate.
